prompt_queue.prompt: Space: portfolio. Generate one distinct, buildable website concept for a personal or studio portfolio site for an individual practitioner. Examples of valid sub-spaces: an architect or interior designer with project case studies, a director or editor with a reel and selected work, a graphic designer or illustrator with a curated case-study set, a developer or technical writer with selected projects, a chef with a tasting-menu and press section, a dancer or choreographer with film and performance archive, a small fine-art studio practice. Stay inside personal/studio practice; do not propose marketplace-style listings of many practitioners.
